tool_args.label: Real Property Disposition Guidelines scope
tool_args.raw_text: These Guidelines apply only to dispositions of real property under Sections 2895-2897 of the Public Authorities Law ("PAL"), including leasing-out or sale of real property and grants of interests in real property such as easements and leasehold interests

payload.claim_text: These Guidelines apply only to dispositions of real property under Sections 2895-2897 of the Public Authorities Law ('PAL'), including leasing-out or sale of real property and grants of interests in real property such as easements and leasehold interests
payload.description: Scope of the Real Property Disposition Guidelines

evidence_refs.source_quote: These Guidelines apply only to dispositions of real property under Sections 2895-2897 of the Public Authorities Law ("PAL")

tool_args.label: Personal Property Disposal Guidelines purpose
tool_args.raw_text: The purpose of these guidelines is to: 1. Ensure that disposal of MTA personal property is undertaken in compliance with governing laws; 2. Define the means for identifying obsolete, unneeded, or otherwise outdated personal property; 3. Provide cost-savings to the MTA by outlining a procedure for the transfer of surplus personal property; 4. Recover value from surplus personal property through its sale; and 5. Minimize disposal and storage costs by providing means for the donation of surplus personal property with negligible resale value.

payload.claim_text: The purpose of these guidelines is to: 1. Ensure that disposal of MTA personal property is undertaken in compliance with governing laws; 2. Define the means for identifying obsolete, unneeded, or otherwise outdated personal property; 3. Provide cost-savings to the MTA by outlining a procedure for the transfer of surplus personal property; 4. Recover value from surplus personal property through its sale; and 5. Minimize disposal and storage costs by providing means for the donation of surplus personal property with negligible resale value.
payload.description: Purpose of the Personal Property Disposal Guidelines

tool_args.label: Manhattan College lease with NYCT
tool_args.raw_text: AGENCY: MTA New York City Transit ("NYCT") LESSEE: Manhattan College LOCATION: 4000 Irwin Avenue, Bronx, New York ACTIVITY: Operation of an athletic field, accessory facilities and parking lots TERM: 10 years, terminable by NYCT on 24 months' notice for corporate purposes SPACE: Approximately 207,975 square feet
